accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including findings, directives, and procedural context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content faithfully tracks the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the purpose of directing removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly references the War Powers Resolution and expedited procedures under 50 U.S.C. 1546a and Public Law 94-329.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately captures the Section 3 rule-of-construction carve-outs and the declaration of war/AUMF exception.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the bill specifies no separate effective date and includes referral context.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the operative directive, findings, and exceptions comprehensively.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and non-partisan throughout.

concise.why: Appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies Senator Warnock, the IRGC, DoD, Committee on Foreign Relations, and cited statutes.

correct_figures.why: The dates stated (February 28, 2026; April 8, 2026) match the bill text.
